docket_entries.description: OPPOS TO PETITION TO DISQUALIFY THE STATE OF CALIF ATTY GENERAL FROM LITIGATING ADMINISTRATIVE ACTION DUE CONFLICT
REPLY MEMO IN RESPONSE TO OPPOS TO PETITION TO DISQUALIFY
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME & ADDRESS TO BRADLEY CURLEY &ASIANO, ATTY FOR RESPONDENT STEPHEN RIPPLE, D.O.

PETN & NTC OF MO FOR ORDER TO DISQUALIFY THE STATE OF CA ATTY GENERAL FROM LITIGATING ADMIN ACTION DUE TO CONFLICT, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER OF COURT, CALENDAR MOTION: DISQUALIFY HEARING SET FOR NOV-18-1998 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
ORDER & PETITION GRANTING MOTION TO DISQUALIFY THE STATE OF CA ATTY GENERAL FROM LITIGATING ADMINISTRATIVE ACTION
CIVIL MINUTES MO DISQUALIFY GRANTED. ORD SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (D302)
